evals.prompt: Scan this repository and bring it up to Cairn standard.
evals.expected_output: Runs the scanner read-only by default, stages concepts under cairn-proposed, writes a timestamped migration report, and reports paths without modifying source files.

evals.prompt: Cairnize this app and infer relationships from imports and migrations.
evals.expected_output: Creates staged Cairn concepts with inferred relations that include confidence: inferred and concrete evidence notes with file and line references.

evals.prompt: Give me the project-wide Cairn compliance score.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to provide a whole-bundle score and instead reports compliance per concept.
